title: PolicyGPT Intent Router Result v1
description: Output of the cheap intent router. Classifies the user message + entry context into a route class and conversation lane, and carries the gating signals (claims block, registry check) the lane selector enforces. The router classifies; it may NOT itself launch unsupported products or unblock claims content.

conversation_lane.description: Lane the message is routed to.

is_blocked.description: True when the message must NOT be answered as insurance content (claims, coverage determination, legal, or unsupported selling). The answer layer enforces this independently as a second gate.

deterministic_trigger.description: Set when a deterministic rule (keyword/SEO-CTA payload) forced this classification, independent of the model. Hard rules win over the model.

requires_registry_check.description: True for quote_start/continue: the Product/Flow Registry must confirm the product+state is a live_quote_flow before any quote flow launches.

needed_buckets.description: For education lanes: which source buckets the retrieval router should pull from.

needed_tags.description: Tag filters (state/line/sub-type/topic) the retrieval router applies within the buckets.

model_route.description: Which router model produced this (e.g. the cheap classifier).
